title: Creative Home Fireplace Firewood Wicker Log Basket Storage | 60 x 40 x 39 cm Large Round Oval | Wicker Basket with Handle Liner | Handmade Durable | Natural Brown Thick Willow Holder
features: GREAT QUALITY – Creative Home firewood basket is handmade from 100% natural wicker that is durable and resistant. The light weight of basket and its handle make the carrying wood from the outside storage area to the fireplace in the living room comfortably. The form of a basket is solid, stable and practical. Maximum recommended weight up to 10 kg.

MULTI-PURPOSE – The basket is great for storing heavier items such as logs and carrying wood to the bonfire. Place a wicker firewood basket next to the fireplace or a stove to keep firewood always at hand in one place and enjoy the blissful warmth.

USEFUL HOME ACCESSORY – The firewood wicker basket is a practical log holder. It will perfectly complement the fireplace arrangement. The basket can also be used for storing toys or gardening accessories.

TIMELESS DESIGN – Firewood wicker basket is a trendy and functional interior accessory that will help you keep your home looking neat and tidy. Thanks to its natural look and neutral brown colour, the basket will perfectly fit into any style of home design.
UK BRAND – As a British brand & small UK business, we ensure we manufacture our products to the highest standards of quality in the world. Our products are produced from natural materials.
description: Product Description Previous page Our wicker basket has been manufactured for the most demanding customers - it is made from high-quality thick wicker that makes it last for years. The basket can be used for a variety of purposes, most commonly as a wood bin, or for storing fruit, toys, laundry etc. Check out our range of Creative Home products that are much more than just decorations. They will help you in everyday life, ensuring great use and trendy look. Next page The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
